creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
System: FreeBSD 14.0-STABLE #49 stable/14-n266462-7169c947ab41: Sat Jan 20 15:19:18 CET 2024 amd64

Hardware: PCengines APU4C4:

mpd5 configuration: connects via PPPoE and modem to ISP.

[...]
root@gate:~ # service mpd5 restart
Stopping mpd5.
Waiting for PIDS: 1086.
Starting mpd5.
root@gate:~ #
 
Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
cpuid = 0; apic id = 00
fault virtual address   = 0x10
fault code              = supervisor read data, page not present
instruction pointer     = 0x20:0xffffffff8098b058
stack pointer           = 0x28:0xfffffe0084230a80
frame pointer           = 0x28:0xfffffe0084230bb0
code segment            = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
                        = DPL 0, pres 1, long 1, def32 0, gran 1
                        processor eflags        = interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
                        current process         = 1611 (isc-net-0001)
                        rdi: fffff80006802800 rsi: 000000000000001c rdx: 0000000000000010
                        rcx: 00000000ffffffff  r8: 00000000000000fd  r9: 000000007ac356fd
                        rax: 0000000000000000 rbx: fffff80006964c70 rbp: fffffe0084230bb0
                        r10: fffff800028894f0 r11: 00000000000000ff r12: fffff80006964c00
                        r13: fffffe0084230b48 r14: fffff80006802800 r15: fffffe0084230b48
                        trap number             = 12
                        panic: page fault
                        cpuid = 0
                        time = 1705856429
                        PC Engines apu2
                        coreboot build 20230131
                        BIOS version v4.19.0.1

At this very moment this is the only message received from the router via console.
